# Exact rational coefficients of the beta_2 family accumulation law (v2.12.21, orders 1..22)
# 1 - q*_j = (2/mu_j)(1 + sum_{n>=1} A_n / mu_j^n)  [asymptotic; Borel representation conjectured]
